title: Midnight Lentil Sopes
description: A twist on traditional Mexican sopes, these midnight lentil sopes combine the flavors of the night with the simplicity of a hearty lentil dish.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine lentils and 2 cups of water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes, or until lentils are tender.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook for 5 minutes, or until softened.
Add garlic, cumin, and chili powder to the skillet. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in cooked lentils and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Meanwhile, warm sopes according to package instructions.
To assemble, place a spoonful of lentil mixture onto each sope, followed by a sprinkle of cheese, a dollop of sour cream, and a sprinkle of cilantro. Serve immediately.
